# Oliver Aleksander Larsen - Software Architecture Researcher

> Software architecture researcher at the University of Southern Denmark (SDU).
> 4 papers at IEEE ICSA 2026, 1 journal paper under revision at Results in Engineering.
> Last updated: 2026-04-10

## Pages
- [Home](https://oalarsen.com/): Personal homepage with bio, news, and selected publications
- [Publications](https://oalarsen.com/publications/): All 5 research papers
- [Projects](https://oalarsen.com/projects/): Software projects including CarboPlanner
- [CV](https://oalarsen.com/cv/): Education, research, experience, and achievements
- [Full Content](https://oalarsen.com/llms-full.txt): Complete site content for AI systems

## Papers
- [Edge-Based Standing-Water Detection via FSM-Guided Tiering and Multi-Model Consensus](https://oalarsen.com/papers/flood-detection/): A deployed edge architecture for standing-water detection that uses an FSM to trade accuracy, latency, and energy across...
- [RAD-AI: Rethinking Architecture Documentation for AI-Augmented Ecosystems](https://oalarsen.com/papers/rad-ai/): A backward-compatible extension of arc42 and C4 for AI-augmented ecosystems, increasing EU AI Act Annex IV documentation...
- [BitSov: A Composable Bitcoin-Native Architecture for Sovereign Internet Infrastructure](https://oalarsen.com/papers/bitsov/): An eight-layer Bitcoin-native protocol stack for sovereign internet infrastructure, featuring payment-gated messaging, t...
- [SAGAI-MID: A Generative AI-Driven Middleware for Dynamic Runtime Interoperability](https://oalarsen.com/papers/sagai-mid/): A FastAPI middleware that uses LLMs to resolve schema mismatches at runtime, achieving 0.90 pass@1 across 10 interoperab...
- [Hybrid Large-Language-Model Meal Recommender System for Athletes: A Short Communication](https://oalarsen.com/papers/meal-recommender/): A hybrid LLM recommender for CarboPlanner that combines in-context learning with LoRA fine-tuned Mistral-7B, achieving 4...

## Research Areas
- Software Architecture for AI-Augmented Systems
- Edge Computing and IoT
- AI Governance and EU AI Act Compliance
- Blockchain Architecture (Bitcoin-native)
- LLM-Driven Middleware and Interoperability

## Projects
- CarboPlanner: Sports nutrition startup. Co-founded and raised 1,090,000 DKK. Built a full-stack platform with React, Flutter, NestJS, and MongoDB for personalized macro tracking and meal planning.
- Hybrid LLM Meal Recommender: Hybrid LLM recommender integrated into CarboPlanner. Combines in-context learning with LoRA/PEFT fine-tuned Mistral-7B for personalized athlete meal planning. 46.7% accuracy, 100% format adherence. Under revision at Results in Engineering.
- Flood Detection System: Edge architecture for standing-water detection in agricultural fields. Raspberry Pi + Jetson AGX Orin running YOLO models with FSM-based orchestration over MQTT.
- Stock Analysis System: Multi-agent LLM trading system with autonomous analysis pipelines. Built with Next.js frontend, Flask backend, MongoDB, Celery task queue, and Redis.
